title: Load a Saved Configuration File to a Replacement Motor
summary: Upload a previously saved .mtr configuration file to a new motor by connecting the replacement motor to power and a laptop running Teknic ClearPath, using File > Load Configuration, and disconnecting the cables when finished.
when_to_use: Use when a replacement motor needs to receive a previously saved configuration file before installation or testing.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to save or download configuration from a working motor.
Do not use this procedure when the saved .mtr configuration file is unavailable.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Connect the replacement motor to power and laptop, load the saved configuration file in ClearPath, and disconnect the cables after upload.

safety_notes: If the motor will be tested, make sure it is clamped down.
This procedure may include powered testing on a replacement motor.
access_or_tools_needed: Means to clamp the motor if testing is planned

access_required: Access to a laptop containing ClearPath software
Access to the saved .mtr configuration file
system_preconditions: Replacement motor is available for configuration upload
If testing is planned, the motor is clamped down before power is applied

visual_references.description: Page 122 maintenance diagram associated with motor replacement workflow and likely showing the motor USB connection point used for configuration transfer.
Figure 7-5 identifying the Teknic SD Motor referenced in the motor replacement and software parameter workflow.

steps.title: Clamp the motor if testing is planned
steps.purpose: Prevent unsafe movement if the replacement motor will be powered for testing.
steps.instruction: If the motor will be tested, make sure it is clamped down before proceeding.
steps.expected_result: The motor is secured against movement before any powered testing.
steps.healthy_condition: Motor is clamped down when testing is planned.
steps.failure_condition: Motor is not clamped down before powered testing.

actions.label: Secure motor for testing
actions.exact_action: If the motor will be tested, make sure it is clamped down.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Identify the Teknic SD motor referenced by the procedure.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if testing is planned and the motor cannot be clamped down safely.

steps.title: Connect power and USB to the replacement motor
steps.purpose: Establish the required physical connections so the laptop running ClearPath can communicate with the replacement motor.
steps.instruction: Connect the power supply cable (4-pin Molex) and the USB cable to the new motor and to the laptop containing the ClearPath software.
steps.expected_result: The replacement motor is connected to power and to the laptop running ClearPath.
steps.healthy_condition: Both the 4-pin Molex power cable and USB cable are connected to the replacement motor and laptop.
steps.failure_condition: Required cables are missing, cannot be connected, or the motor is not connected to both power and laptop.

actions.label: Connect power cable
actions.exact_action: Connect the power supply cable (4-pin Molex) to the new motor.

actions.label: Connect USB cable
actions.exact_action: Connect the USB cable to the new motor and to the laptop containing the ClearPath software.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the motor USB access point or USB port cover associated with configuration transfer.
Identify the Teknic SD motor being connected for configuration upload.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the required power supply cable (4-pin Molex) or USB cable is unavailable.
Escalate if the replacement motor cannot be connected to the laptop containing ClearPath software.

steps.title: Load the saved configuration file in ClearPath
steps.purpose: Transfer the previously saved .mtr configuration file onto the replacement motor.
steps.instruction: Open the File menu in the ClearPath software and select Load Configuration to load the saved configuration file.
steps.expected_result: The saved .mtr configuration file is loaded to the replacement motor.
steps.healthy_condition: ClearPath accepts the Load Configuration action and the upload completes.
steps.failure_condition: The saved configuration file is unavailable, cannot be selected, or cannot be loaded to the new motor.

actions.label: Open File menu
actions.exact_action: Open the File menu in the ClearPath software.

actions.label: Load configuration file
actions.exact_action: Select Load Configuration to load the saved configuration file.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the page 122 motor replacement workflow associated with Teknic ClearPath usage for saving or uploading .mtr files.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the saved configuration file is unavailable.
Escalate if the saved configuration file cannot be loaded to the new motor.

steps.title: Disconnect the cables after upload
steps.purpose: Return the replacement motor and laptop to a disconnected state after the configuration upload is finished.
steps.instruction: Disconnect the cables when the configuration upload is finished.
steps.expected_result: The power and USB cables are disconnected after the upload completes.
steps.healthy_condition: Cables are disconnected only after the configuration upload is finished.
steps.failure_condition: Cables are disconnected before upload completion or cannot be disconnected normally.

actions.label: Disconnect cables
actions.exact_action: Disconnect the cables when the configuration upload is finished.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the upload does not finish and the motor cannot be left in a normal disconnected state.

success_criteria: The saved .mtr configuration file is loaded onto the replacement motor.
The upload procedure is completed and the cables are disconnected when finished.
healthy_conditions: If testing is planned, the motor is clamped down before power is applied.
The replacement motor is connected to both the 4-pin Molex power cable and USB cable.
ClearPath is used to perform File > Load Configuration with the saved .mtr file.
The cables are disconnected after the upload is finished.
failure_conditions: The saved .mtr configuration file is unavailable.
The saved configuration file cannot be loaded to the new motor.
Required power or USB connections cannot be made.
Testing is planned but the motor is not clamped down.
escalation_guidance: Escalate to L2 support review if the saved configuration file is unavailable.
Escalate if ClearPath cannot load the saved configuration file to the replacement motor.
Escalate if the replacement motor cannot be connected to the required power and USB interfaces.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Motor USB access point and page 122 workflow context for Teknic ClearPath configuration transfer.
Teknic SD motor identification relevant to the replacement motor configuration task.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide a verification method beyond completing the Load Configuration action.
The source packet does not provide an estimated time for this procedure.
The source packet does not state whether production stop or LOTO is required for this configuration upload task.
The source packet does not provide detailed ClearPath screen imagery for the File > Load Configuration action.
